title: Bridge Essay: A Multi-Brain Framework for Social Interaction.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Ritual** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Neural synchrony — interpersonal brain-to-brain coupling, hyperscanning, joint music-making, collective entrainment.

**A Multi-Brain Framework for Social Interaction.**. Trends Neurosci.. PMID: 32709376. DOI: 10.1016/j.tins.2020.06.008. Social interaction can be seen as adynamic feedback loop that couples action, reaction, and internal cognitive processes across individual agents. Afuller understanding of the social brain requires adescription of how the neural dynamics across coupled brains are linked and how they coevolve over time. We elaborate amulti-brain framework that considers social interaction as an integrated network of neural systems that dynamically shape behavior, shared cognitive states, and social relationsh
